understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all KA59 levels by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable simultaneously; only when all goals are covered at once does the level (and ultimately the run) report WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (up/down/left/right) shift the currently selected piece on a grid where each cell corresponds to 3x3 pixels, using the pixel-coordinate system shown in state (e.g., [x,y]). Walls ('#') can block movement depending on collision behavior, and adjacent pushable blocks ('B') can be pushed if the selected piece moves into them and space permits. Multiple selectables can exist; CLICK with an exact on-screen pixel position switches control to the selectable at that coordinate, and the semantic grid marks the selected piece as 'P' and other selectables as 'S'.
